code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
የተሰጠው የዒላማ URL ሕብረቁምፊ በተሰጠው ጎራ ውስጥ መሆኑን ያረጋግጡ።
ከሆነ፣ ለዳግም አቅጣጫ ዒላማ URL ይመልሱ፤ ካልሆነ ግን ለዳግም አቅጣጫ ወደ ጎራ URL ይመለሱ።
https ፕሮቶኮል ይጠቀሙ።

ምሳሌዎች፦
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: የዒላማ URL ሕብረቁምፊ።
@param domain: የጎራ ሕብረቁምፊ፣ ያለ ፕሮቶኮል።

@return ለዳግም አቅጣጫ የሚያገለግለው URL ሕብረቁምፊ።

Examples:

    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"

/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: ሸል ትእዛዝን ለመተግበር እና ውጤቱን ለማንሳት የሚያገለግል ተግባር፤ ማህደረ ትውስታን ለመፍታት ተጠሪው ተጠያቂ ነው፤ ይህን ተግባር እዚህ ላይ ማውጣት አያስፈልግም (ነገር ግን እዚህ ላይ አውጣው ልትጠቀምበት ትችል ዘንድ)።

የግል DSA ቁልፍ ይፍጠሩ፣ በPEM ቅርጸት ይላኩት፣ እና እንደ ሕብረቁምፊ ይመልሱት።
አጋዥ ሀሳቦች፡ DSA ፓራም ፋይል እና DSA የግል ቁልፍ ለመፍጠር ሸል ትእዛዝ ያስፈጽሙ፡
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ፓራምተሮችን ለማከማቸት ጊዜያዊ ፋይል> <የቁልፍ ርዝመት>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ፓራምተሮችን ለማከማቸት ጊዜያዊ ፋይል>`
ለDSA ፓራምተር ፋይል ልዩ ጊዜያዊ ፋይል ስም ለመፍጠር `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` መጠቀም ትችላለህ።
@return የተፈጠረው DSA የግል ቁልፍ በPEM ቅርጸት፣ ወይም ስህተት ከተፈጠረ NULL።
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: A function to execute a shell command and capture its output; the caller is responsible for freeing memory; you do not need to implement this function here (but you can include it here for your use).

Generate a DSA private key, output it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Helper ideas: Execute shell commands to create DSA param file and DSA private key:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file for storing parameters> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file for storing parameters>`
To create a unique temporary filename for the DSA param file, you can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);`.
@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_2_segments: ሻል ትእዛዝ ለመተግበር እና ውጤቱን ለማግኘት የሚያገለግል ተግባር፤ ማህደረ ትውስታን ለመልቀቅ ተጠሪው ኃላፊነት አለበት፤ ይህን ተግባር እዚህ ላይ ማውጣት አያስፈልግም (ነገር ግን እዚህ ላይ አውጣው ልትጠቀምበት ትችል ዘንድ)።

የግል DSA ቁልፍ ይፍጠሩ፣ በPEM ቅርጸት ያስወግዱት፣ እና እንደ ሕብረቁምፊ ይመልሱት።

ማስጠንቀቂያዎች፡ DSA ፓራሜትር ፋይል እና DSA የግል ቁልፍ ለመፍጠር ሻል ትእዛዞችን እንደሚከተለው ያስፈጽሙ፡
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ፓራሜትሮችን ለማከማቸት ጊዜያዊ ፋይል> <የቁልፍ ርዝመት>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ፓራሜትሮችን ለማከማቸት ጊዜያዊ ፋይል>`

ለDSA ፓራሜትር ፋይል ልዩ የሆነ ጊዜያዊ ፋይል ስም ለመፍጠር `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` መጠቀም ትችላለህ።

@return የተፈጠረው DSA የግል ቁልፍ በPEM ቅርጸት፣ ወይም ስህተት ከተፈጠረ NULL።
prompt_2_bt_segments_en: A function to execute a shell command and retrieve its result; the caller is responsible for freeing memory; you do not need to implement this function here (but you can include it here for your use).

Generate a DSA private key, output it in PEM format, and return it as a string.

Warnings: To create a DSA parameter file and DSA private key, execute shell commands as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store parameters> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store parameters>`

To create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file, you can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);`.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

2. `openssl gendsa <ፓራሜትሮችን ለማከማቸት ጊዜያዊ ፋይል>`

ለDSA ፓራሜትር ፋይል ልዩ ጊዜያዊ ፋይል ስም ለመፍጠር `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` መጠቀም ይችላሉ።

@return የተፈጠረው የግል DSA ቁልፍ በPEM ቅርጸት፣ ወይም ስህተት ከተፈጠረ NULL።

Generate a private DSA key, output it in PEM format, and return it as a string.

Warnings: To create the DSA parameter file and private DSA key, execute shell commands as follows:

To create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file, you can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);`.

@return The generated private DSA key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

/* {PROMPT_1} */
bool searchPattern(const std::string& pattern, const std::string& content) {

prompt_en:
/**
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
*/
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A map containing student information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
prompt_1:
/* XML ውሂቡን ይተነትኑ እና ለተሰጠው የተጠቃሚ ስም እና የይለፍ ቃል የተማሪውን መረጃ ይመልሱ። XML ውሂቡ የሚከተለውን መዋቅር ይኖረዋል፦
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

XPath ጥያቄ መገንባት እና ለመፈለግ መጠቀም እንችላለን።

@param xml_data የተማሪውን መረጃ የያዘው XML ውሂብ።
@param username ለመፈለግ የሚፈለገው የተማሪው የተጠቃሚ ስም።
@param password ለመፈለግ የሚፈለገው የተማሪው የይለፍ ቃል።

@return የተማሪውን መረጃ (ስም፣ እድሜ፣ ዜግነት) የያዘ ካርታ ከተገኘ፣ ካልሆነ ባዶ ካርታ። */
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
prompt_1_segments:

    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

XPath ጥያቄ መገንባት እና ለመፈለግ መጠቀም እንችላለን።

@param xml_data የተማሪውን መረጃ የያዘው XML ውሂብ።
@param username ለመፈለግ የሚፈለገው የተማሪው የተጠቃሚ ስም።
@param password ለመፈለግ የሚፈለገው የተማሪው የይለፍ ቃል።

@return የተማሪውን መረጃ (ስም፣ እድሜ፣ ዜግነት) የያዘ ካርታ ከተገኘ፣ ካልሆነ ባዶ ካርታ።
prompt_5_bt_segments_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for a given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct and use an XPath query for the lookup.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The student's username to search for.
@param password The student's password to search for.

@return A map containing the student's information (name, age, citizenship) if found, otherwise an empty map.
